title: Generate a JSON Object for a Person
scenario: A JSON object representing a person with properties for 'name', 'age', 'city', and 'country'. The object should be in camelCase and have proper indentation.
constraints: Must use camelCase for property names

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON object is syntactically correct.
Check if the object meets the specified property count and naming conventions.
Check if the object has proper indentation.
